_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 associated cutaneous neurofibromas: validation of the Dutch cNF-Skindex.

_contextSnippet: Adequate test-retest reliability was observed for both the total cNF-Skindex score (Spearman's correlation r = 0.88), the 'Functioning' subdomain (r = 0.89), 'Emotions' subdomain (r = 0.83), and 'Symptoms' subdomain (r = 0.85)
details: Adequate test-retest reliability with Spearman correlations: total score r=0.88, Functioning r=0.89, Emotions r=0.83, Symptoms r=0.85 (all p<0.001)
